title: Tokens: Map design tokens to CSS variables

title: Tokens: Generate src/styles/tokens.css
description: Create CSS variables file from design-system/TOKENS.md and add :root mapping; include comments and examples.

title: Frontend: Implement frontend scaffold from shell mockups
description: Create a Vue + Vite scaffold from mockups/app-shell.html and mockups/1.1.1-counting-game.html. Tasks: tokens, styles, components, game logic, dev container. Implement inside container per AGENTS.md.

description: Create reusable components (Header, Sidebar, Card, Button) and integrate into App.vue; ensure accessible markup.
notes: Started implementing UI components (AppHeader, AppSidebar, CardBase, BaseButton).

description: Complete src/styles/components.css, global resets, and ensure components consume CSS variables from tokens.css.
notes: Refined src/styles/components.css and integrated token usage.

title: Frontend: Game logic - refine and test
description: Improve game logic in pages/Game.vue, add edge-case handling, unit tests or e2e checks, and accessibility improvements.

title: Devops: Devcontainer + CI
description: Add devcontainer, Dockerfile polish, and simple CI (lint/build) to run work inside containers per AGENTS.md.
notes: CI workflow removed from commit; leaving CI out for now per request. Will recreate later when ready.

title: Tokens: Docs & Verify mapping
description: Add token documentation (usage examples) and verify visual mapping in UI; include screenshot checklist and tests if available.
